meta.statute: 7 U.S.C. 2013(a)(2), as added by Pub. L. 119-21 §10105 (OBBBA)
meta.delayRule: PER × 1.5 ≥ 20% (≥13.33%) in FY2025 delays a state's first cost-share year to FY2029; in FY2026, to FY2030 (7 U.S.C. 2013(a)(2)(B)(iii)).
meta.electionRule: FY2028 uses the state's FY2025 or FY2026 PER at the state's election; FY2029+ uses the third preceding fiscal year (7 U.S.C. 2013(a)(2)(B)(ii)).
meta.perSource: FNS/FNA SNAP payment error rate tables, FY2017–19 and FY2022–25 (FY2020–21 not published under COVID QC waivers).
meta.issuanceSource: FNA National Data Bank, SNAP monthly state benefit summary FY2025 (P-EBT excluded), data as of 2026-06-12.
meta.seSource: Bootstrap (B=1000) of the dollar-weighted error ratio on the FY2024 SNAP QC public-use file (n=44,891), FY2024 $56 tolerance applied; state CVs scaled to official FY2025 rates.
meta.toleranceNote: Errors under the QC tolerance threshold ($56 FY2024, $57 FY2025, $58 FY2026) are excluded from the PER.
